description_md: Sequential primary key (one row per ZooDB sample).
CalCOFI cruise natural key (YYYY-MM-NODC) derived from cruise_orig + ship + date; NULL where unresolved (see questions).
NODC ship code resolved from ship_name (unpooled only).
CalCOFI station key 'LLL.L SSS.S' from line + station (unpooled only).
CalCOFI grid-cell key assigned spatially (unpooled only).
Point geometry (EPSG:4326) from longitude/latitude (unpooled only).
Sequential primary key for the higher-taxon lookup.
Verbatim ZooDB higher-taxon label (e.g. 'COPEPODA CALANOIDA CALANIDAE').
WoRMS AphiaID for the resolved taxon concept.
WoRMS accepted scientific name.
WoRMS taxonomic rank (Phylum/Class/Order/Suborder/Superfamily/Family).
WoRMS status of the matched name (accepted / unaccepted).
WoRMS kingdom.
WoRMS phylum.
WoRMS class.
WoRMS order (column named order_taxon; 'order' is a SQL reserved word).
WoRMS family.
Sequential primary key (one row per sample x taxon x measurement_type).
FK to zoodb_sample.sample_id.
FK to zoodb_taxon.taxon_id.
FK to measurement_type.measurement_type (zooplankton_abundance / zooplankton_abundance_areal / zooplankton_biomass_carbon).
Abundance (count/1000m3 or count/m2) or carbon biomass (mg C/m2). 0 = analyzed-but-absent.
